form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 390m in 22.48. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 390m at this track at Class 3/4 level. Look for improvement. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Last start finished last on March 26 over 295m at Addington behind Dingo Night beaten 10 lengths (17.78) in a Class 5. Has an excellent 22.35 best time at this course and distance. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (22.86) in a Class 3/4, finishing a head second. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and six minors. Definite contender.
